news.title:
Hotel and restaurant stocks trade mixed on LPG supply disruption concerns; Indian Hotels up 0.75%, Westlife Foodworld gains 1.52%.
Government prioritizes domestic LPG supply, impacting non-domestic sectors; FHRAI urges action to prevent financial strain in hospitality.
news.summary:
Hotel and restaurant stocks trade mixed on LPG supply disruption concerns; Indian Hotels up 0.75%, Westlife Foodworld gains 1.52%.
Government prioritizes domestic LPG supply, impacting non-domestic sectors; FHRAI urges action to prevent financial strain in hospitality.

news.title:
Indian Hotels reports a 5-7% revenue impact due to geopolitical tensions.
West Asia conflict is a key factor affecting Indian Hotels' performance.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels reports a 5-7% revenue impact due to geopolitical tensions.
West Asia conflict is a key factor affecting Indian Hotels' performance.

news.title: IHCL CEO notes Dubai hotels impacted by geopolitical tensions but domestic demand remains strong.
news.summary: IHCL CEO notes Dubai hotels impacted by geopolitical tensions but domestic demand remains strong.

news.title:
AI poses risks and opportunities for India's IT sector; pivoting to enterprise AI consulting may slow revenue growth.
GREED & Fear reshuffles portfolio: Home First Finance replaced by Adani Power; Ixigo swapped for IndiGo; Lemon Tree for Indian Hotels.
news.summary:
AI poses risks and opportunities for India's IT sector; pivoting to enterprise AI consulting may slow revenue growth.
GREED & Fear reshuffles portfolio: Home First Finance replaced by Adani Power; Ixigo swapped for IndiGo; Lemon Tree for Indian Hotels.

news.title:
Tata Sons' revenue doubled to ₹11.5L cr, profit tripled to ₹1L cr under N Chandrasekaran.
Tata Steel, Indian Hotels showed turnaround; TCS, Tata Motors faced challenges amid IT, auto sector woes.
news.summary:
Tata Sons' revenue doubled to ₹11.5L cr, profit tripled to ₹1L cr under N Chandrasekaran.
Tata Steel, Indian Hotels showed turnaround; TCS, Tata Motors faced challenges amid IT, auto sector woes.

news.title:
ICRA upgrades Indian Hotels' long-term rating to AAA Stable citing strong financials, market position, and liquidity.
Short-term rating reaffirmed at A1 with a stable outlook due to healthy revenue growth.
news.summary:
ICRA upgrades Indian Hotels' long-term rating to AAA Stable citing strong financials, market position, and liquidity.
Short-term rating reaffirmed at A1 with a stable outlook due to healthy revenue growth.

news.title:
Indian Hotels' Q3 revenue rose 12% YoY to INR 2,900 cr with strong margins.
PAT reached INR 668 cr, up 15% YoY, driven by diversified brands and expansions.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels' Q3 revenue rose 12% YoY to INR 2,900 cr with strong margins.
PAT reached INR 668 cr, up 15% YoY, driven by diversified brands and expansions.

news.title: Indian Hotels expects RevPAR growth in the range of 9-11%.
news.summary: Indian Hotels expects RevPAR growth in the range of 9-11%.

news.title: Morgan Stanley gives 'Equal-weight' rating to Indian Hotels with Rs 780 target.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley gives 'Equal-weight' rating to Indian Hotels with Rs 780 target.

news.title:
Indian Hotels Company Ltd targets double-digit revenue growth by FY27.
Plans to add 60 hotel openings by FY27 to fuel growth.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels Company Ltd targets double-digit revenue growth by FY27.
Plans to add 60 hotel openings by FY27 to fuel growth.

news.title:
Coal India & Biocon reported mixed results; Coal India's profit beat estimates while Biocon's net profit rose YoY despite missing estimates.
IRCTC, Indian Hotels, and Engineers India posted strong revenue/profit growth, while Schneider Electric & Petronet LNG showed steady performance.
news.summary:
Coal India & Biocon reported mixed results; Coal India's profit beat estimates while Biocon's net profit rose YoY despite missing estimates.
IRCTC, Indian Hotels, and Engineers India posted strong revenue/profit growth, while Schneider Electric & Petronet LNG showed steady performance.

news.title:
Indian Hotels announces Mr. Beejal Desai's superannuation as EVP & Company Secretary on Feb 12, 2026.
Ms. Melisa Alva, an experienced governance professional, appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer from Feb 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels announces Mr. Beejal Desai's superannuation as EVP & Company Secretary on Feb 12, 2026.
Ms. Melisa Alva, an experienced governance professional, appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer from Feb 13, 2026.

news.title:
IHCL achieves 15th record quarter, revenue up 12% YoY to INR 2,900 Cr.
EBITDA increases 11% to INR 1,134 Cr, PAT surges 55% to INR 903 Cr.
news.summary:
IHCL achieves 15th record quarter, revenue up 12% YoY to INR 2,900 Cr.
EBITDA increases 11% to INR 1,134 Cr, PAT surges 55% to INR 903 Cr.

news.title:
Indian Hotels reported Q3 FY26 revenue at ₹1613.8 cr, up from ₹1473.6 cr YoY.
Net profit rose to ₹920.6 cr vs ₹468.8 cr, aided by ₹433.5 cr exceptional gain.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels reported Q3 FY26 revenue at ₹1613.8 cr, up from ₹1473.6 cr YoY.
Net profit rose to ₹920.6 cr vs ₹468.8 cr, aided by ₹433.5 cr exceptional gain.

news.title:
IHCL will host a global conference call on Q3 FY26 results on February 12, 2026, at 7 PM IST.
The presentation will be uploaded on the website, and dial-in details are provided for multiple locations.
news.summary:
IHCL will host a global conference call on Q3 FY26 results on February 12, 2026, at 7 PM IST.
The presentation will be uploaded on the website, and dial-in details are provided for multiple locations.

news.title:
Indian Hotels executed an NSE block trade for ~696,051 shares at Rs. 652.35.
The transaction totaled Rs. 45.41 crores, highlighting significant trading activity.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels executed an NSE block trade for ~696,051 shares at Rs. 652.35.
The transaction totaled Rs. 45.41 crores, highlighting significant trading activity.

news.title:
Indian Hotels acquired 51% stake in Sparsh Infratech for ₹232 Cr.
This acquisition makes Sparsh Infratech a subsidiary and aids entry into wellness.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels acquired 51% stake in Sparsh Infratech for ₹232 Cr.
This acquisition makes Sparsh Infratech a subsidiary and aids entry into wellness.

news.title:
Indian Hotels Company Ltd (IHCL) to acquire 51% stake in Brij Hospitality for up to ₹225 crore.
Brij Hospitality operates 22 hotels, 11 operational, with FY 2024-25 turnover of ₹62.3 crore.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels Company Ltd (IHCL) to acquire 51% stake in Brij Hospitality for up to ₹225 crore.
Brij Hospitality operates 22 hotels, 11 operational, with FY 2024-25 turnover of ₹62.3 crore.

news.title:
Nomura initiates buy on Indian Hotels with target price of 830, citing improved earnings quality and RoIC.
Asset-light expansion and Ginger brand position Indian Hotels to meet/exceed 2030 revenue, RoCE, and portfolio goals.
news.summary:
Nomura initiates buy on Indian Hotels with target price of 830, citing improved earnings quality and RoIC.
Asset-light expansion and Ginger brand position Indian Hotels to meet/exceed 2030 revenue, RoCE, and portfolio goals.

news.title:
Indian Hotels shares fell 3% to ₹703.3 after Morgan Stanley downgraded to 'equal weight' and cut the price target to ₹780.
Morgan Stanley highlighted limited upside despite strong revenue cycles; shares dropped 16.9% over the past year.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels shares fell 3% to ₹703.3 after Morgan Stanley downgraded to 'equal weight' and cut the price target to ₹780.
Morgan Stanley highlighted limited upside despite strong revenue cycles; shares dropped 16.9% over the past year.
